questionText: A vector in $x-y$ plane makes an angle of $30^{\circ}$ with $y$-axis. The magnitude of $\mathrm{y}$-component of vector is $2 \sqrt{3}$. The magnitude of $x$-component of the vector will be :
subject: Mathematics

questionText: What will be the projection of vector $$\overrightarrow A  = \widehat i + \widehat j + \widehat k$$ on vector $$\overrightarrow B  = \widehat i + \widehat j$$ ?
subject: Mathematics
solution:
Projection = $${{\overrightarrow A .\overrightarrow B } \over {\left| {\overrightarrow B } \right|}}(\widehat B)$$

$$ = {{(\widehat i + \widehat j + \widehat k).(\widehat i + \widehat j)} \over {\sqrt 2 }}{{(\widehat i + \widehat j)} \over {\sqrt 2 }}$$

$$ = {2 \over {\sqrt 2 }} $$$$ \times $$$$ {{(\widehat i + \widehat j)} \over {\sqrt 2 }}$$

$$ = (\widehat i + \widehat j)$$
